name: Longshore
description_short: Longshore Federal Credit Union is a member-owned credit union serving Grays Harbor County, Washington since 1960, offering lending and deposit products to local members.
description_long:
Longshore Federal Credit Union has been serving the Grays Harbor County community since 1960, operating as a member-owned, not-for-profit financial institution. The credit union is headquartered in Hoquiam, Washington and maintains a local focus on serving members along the shore. As a federally chartered credit union, Longshore is regulated by the NCUA and offers NCUA-insured savings products to members.

Longshore offers a range of consumer financial services including loan products, deposit accounts (share accounts and share certificates), direct deposit services, online banking, and mobile banking solutions. The institution provides loan calculators on their website to help members estimate loan costs and terms. They issue Longshore FCU Debit Mastercard products with accompanying mobile app functionality that allows cardholders to monitor spending, set budgets, and control card activation remotely.

The credit union distinguishes itself through its long-standing community presence in Grays Harbor County and emphasis on member-focused digital services. They have invested in modern banking technology including a HomeBanking mobile app available on iOS and Android platforms, alongside their online banking portal. The organization maintains direct communication channels including phone, email, and in-person service at their Hoquiam location.

Longshore is best suited for residents and workers in Grays Harbor County seeking a community-focused financial institution with modern digital banking tools. However, the website provides limited detail on specific loan products, interest rates, membership eligibility requirements, or comprehensive service offerings, making it difficult to assess the full scope of products available compared to larger credit unions.
services: Share accounts (deposit accounts) with NCUA insurance
Consumer loans with online loan calculators
Online banking portal with login and enrollment
HomeBanking mobile app for iOS and Android
Longshore FCU Debit Mastercard with control app
Debit card spending monitoring and budget tools
pros: NCUA-insured member accounts providing federal deposit protection up to $250,000
Mobile banking app (HomeBanking) available on iOS and Android for convenient access
Debit card control app allowing real-time card activation/deactivation and spending monitoring
Online loan calculators to help members estimate costs before applying
Direct deposit services available for members
Long operational history since 1960 demonstrating stability and community commitment
Local in-person service at Hoquiam branch for member support
cons: Extremely limited geographic footprint - serves only Grays Harbor County, not accessible to most consumers
Website provides minimal information about loan types, APRs, terms, or specific rates offered
No details on membership eligibility requirements or opening minimums
Limited online information about savings products, share certificates, or deposit account types
No information about fees, terms, or special programs for different member segments
best_for: Grays Harbor County residents seeking a community-focused credit union with modern digital banking
Local workers wanting member-owned institution benefits with mobile app convenience
Individuals preferring small, local financial institutions over national banks
diagnosis: Longshore Federal Credit Union is best for Grays Harbor County residents seeking a local, member-owned alternative to traditional banks with modern mobile banking features. The primary caveat is severe geographic limitation—membership appears restricted to the Grays Harbor County area, making this institution inaccessible to most consumers outside this region.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
meta_title: Longshore — Credit Union in Hoquiam, WA | CreditDoc
meta_description: Longshore — NCUA-insured credit union in Hoquiam, WA. Member-owned, not-for-profit. Loans, savings, and member services.
